about.title: About Me
about.description: I am a Full-Stack developer with experience in creating modern web applications. I specialize in the JavaScript ecosystem, including Vue.js, React, Node.js, and TypeScript.
about.passion: My passion is creating elegant and efficient solutions to complex problems. I am constantly learning new technologies and approaches to development.
